rows.description: Deficiency of Rector's Receipts see Decree of March 10. 1798 Register p.245
rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribed 'Rector's', 'Decree of March', and 'Register'. gpt-5-mini had several transcription errors in this longer text. Amounts are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
rows.english_description: Sum to cover the deficiency of the rector's receipts as directed by the decree of 10 March 1798 (see Register p.245).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Sum to cover the deficiency of the rector's receipts as directed by the decree of 10 March 1798 (see Register p.245), amounting to £108 9s 7½d.

rows.notes: Description and non-fractional amounts are consistent across both. The fraction '¼' is clearly visible in the image; gpt-5-mini correctly identified 0.25, while gemini-flash misidentified it as 0.75. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's fraction.

Description and amounts are consistent across both. Row type 'total' from gemini-flash, which is more appropriate for a re-statement of a total amount for reconciliation, as opposed to gpt-5-mini's 'entry'.

Description and non-fractional amounts are consistent across both. Row type 'total' from gemini-flash for consistency with reconciliation lines. The fraction '¼' is clearly visible in the image; gpt-5-mini correctly identified 0.25, while gemini-flash misidentified it as 0.75. Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's fraction.
All values agreed upon by both extractors and visually confirmed as clear. gpt-5-mini's note additionally confirmed arithmetic consistency, strengthening trust.
